title: Strongthium Throttle Springs Assortment Governor Idle Springs Linkage Control Kit for Honda Briggs and Stratton Small Engines GX160 GCV160 GX270 GX340 Predator Champion generators
features: 2 × Governor spring（262759,692211）+ 4 × Anti surge spring（691859 , 263109) ，For many Briggs & Stratton and lawn mower engines.

2 x throttle return springs + 2 x speed control springs+ 2 x throttle rod(16561-Z0L-000 16562-ZM0-000 ), For Honda small engines GCV 160 160A 160LA 190 190A 190LA,for Honda Toro Lawn Boy Craftsman Cud Cadet related with above engines push mower, walk behaind mower, generators, power pressure washers and so on.
2 × vane choke Spring + 2pcs × governor springs( 790849 699056)，for Briggs & Stratton Toro Craftsman Troy Bilt Lawn Mower Engines.

2 x throttle return springs + 2 x speed control springs + 2 x throttle rod + 2 x cable springs (16561-Z4M-010 16555-Z4M-000 16562-Z4M-000 16592-ZE1-180), for gasoline generators 2kw thru 4kw around and small engines 168F 160cc 196cc GX160 GX200 170F 212cc 224cc mini bike, go kart, tiller, water pump, power pressure washer, snow blower and so on.

2 x throttle springs set for many Honda Predator Generac Champion generators 420cc 389cc 5500 6500 6800 7000 7500 8000 8750 9000 9200 950016100-ZF6-D42,16100-ZF6-D02,16100-ZE3-704,16100-ZE3-702 16100-Z5R-743 EB6500X EB6500SX EB5000X EM5000S EM5000SX EM5000X EM5000 EB5000X EW171.

2x throttle springs set for Honda GX240 GX270 Predator 8.0 9.0 hp 301cc, Honda replica engines Predator Champion Duromax Powerhorse Coleman Generac Ryobi Homelite Blackmax Ducar Lifan Loncin Zongshen etc., for pressure washers, water pumps, trash pumps, tiller, mini bike, go karts, log splitters, air compressors and many others.
Made of quality metal material, firm and sturdy to use. Please compare the product pictures carefully before making orders.
description: Product Description The kit contains 2x throttle return springs, 2x speed control springs, 2x throttle rod and 2x cable springs made of quality metal material, firm and sturdy to use. Part number 16561-Z4M-010 16555-Z4M-000 16562-Z4M-000 16592-ZE1-180. The throttle return spring set is for gasoline generators 2kw thru 4kw around and small engines 168F 160cc 196cc GX160 GX200 170F 212cc 224cc mini bike, go kart, tiller, water pump, power pressure washer, snow blower and so on. For Lifan Titan Locin Ducar Rato Coleman Baja Ct200u Ct200u-ex Tx200 Rb200 Rtk200 Ck196 Kt196 Bt200x Bk200 MB165 MB200 168f 168 engines. For above engine related generators 2500 2900 2800 3000 3500 4000 4500 4375 3650 3550 and so one. The kit includes 2x throttle return springs, 2x speed control springs, 2x throttle rod, made of quality metal material, firm and sturdy to use. Part number 16561-Z0L-000 16562-ZM0-000 16562-ZM0-000, Please check product images before ordering. The throttle return spring set is for Honda small engines GCV 160 160A 160LA 190 190A 190LA. For Honda Toro Lawn Boy Craftsman Cud Cadet related with above engines push mower, walk behaind mower, generators, power pressure washers and so on. For HRX217 HRR216 HRB216 HRS216 HRT216 HRZ216 HR215 HR216 and many others HRR HRX HRZ HRT HRB HRS HRT mowers. Governor spring part number: 262759,692211 , Anti surge spring part number: 691859 , 263109 Made of durable Spring Steel material. For many Briggs & Stratton and lawn mower engines. Coms in 2 pcs × Governor spring + 2pcs × Anti surge spring in nylon pakage. 2 × Vane choke Spring + 2pcs × governor springs( 790849 699056)，for Briggs & Stratton Toro Craftsman Troy Bilt Lawn Mower Engines. 2x Throttle springs set for Honda GX240 GX270 Predator 8.0 9.0 hp 301cc, Honda replica engines Predator Champion Duromax Powerhorse Coleman Generac Ryobi Homelite Blackmax Ducar Lifan Loncin Zongshen etc., for pressure washers, water pumps, trash pumps, tiller, mini bike, go karts, log splitters, air compressors and many others. 2 x Throttle springs set for many Honda Predator Generac Champion generators 420cc 389cc 5500 6500 6800 7000 7500 8000 8750 9000 9200 950016100-ZF6-D42,16100-ZF6-D02,16100-ZE3-704,16100-ZE3-702 16100-Z5R-743 EB6500X EB6500SX EB5000X EM5000S EM5000SX EM5000X EM5000 EB5000X EW171.
